scripts.dev: npm run build -w @repohelm/core && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @repohelm/server" "npm run dev -w @repohelm/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @repohelm/core && npm run build -w @repohelm/server && npm run build -w @repohelm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @repohelm/core && npm run typecheck -w @repohelm/server && npm run typecheck -w @repohelm/web
